response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content. 00:00-04:00 is merchandise promotion with background music. 2. Identified the song 'ray' starting at 04:00.601 via title screen and on-screen credit to '藤原基央' (Motoo Fujiwara). 3. Used the search tool to find the lyrics for 'ray' by BUMP OF CHICKEN (the original artist for this song). 4. Mapped the scenes and included the full lyrics in Japanese and an English translation.
response.global_summary: This video shows Oozora Subaru (a VTuber) presenting her 7th-anniversary live goods (a rubber mat, card sleeves, a card case, plush keychains, and a sticker) followed by a performance of the song 'ray'.

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru showcases her 7th-anniversary merchandise, including a rubber mat, card sleeves, a card case, plush keychains, and a sticker. Background music is playing, but there are no vocals.
Oozora Subaru performs the song 'ray'. The lyrics appear on-screen. Credits indicate music and lyrics by Motoo Fujiwara.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
お別れしたのはもっと前の事だったような
悲しい光は封じ込めて踵すり減らしたんだ
君といた時は見えた今は見えなくなった
透明な彗星をぼんやりとでもそれだけ探している
しょっちゅう唄を歌ったよその時だけのメロディーを
寂しくなんか無かったよちゃんと寂しくなれたから
いつまでどこまでなんて正常か異常かなんて
考える暇も無い程歩くのは大変だ
楽しい方がずっといいよごまかして笑っていくよ
大丈夫だあの痛みは忘れたって消えやしない
理想でつくった道を現実が塗り替えていくよ
思い出はその軌跡の上で輝きになって残っている
お別れしたのは何で何のタメだったんだろうな
悲しい光が僕の影を前に長く伸ばしている
時々熱が出るよ時間がある時眠るよ
夢だと解るその中で君と会ってからまた行こう
晴天とはほど遠い終わらない暗闇にも
星を思い浮かべたならすぐ銀河の中だ
あまり泣かなくなっても靴を新しくしても
大丈夫だあの痛みは忘れたって消えやしない
伝えたかった事がきっとあったんだろうな
恐らくありきたりなんだろうけどこんなにも
お別れした事は出会った事と繋がっている
あの透明な彗星は透明だから無くならない
◯×△どれかなんて皆と比べてどうかなんて
確かめる間も無い程生きるのは最高だ
あまり泣かなくなってもごまかして笑っていくよ
大丈夫だあの痛みは忘れたって消えやしない
大丈夫だこの光の始まりには君がいる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It feels like we said our goodbyes a long time ago
I locked away the sad light and wore down my heels
I could see it when I was with you, but now I can't
I'm still searching for that transparent comet, even if only faintly
I sang songs all the time, melodies just for that moment
I wasn't lonely, because I was able to be properly lonely
Thinking about how far, or whether it's normal or abnormal
It's hard work, there's no time to think
It's much better to have fun, I'll just smile and bluff my way through
It's okay, that pain won't disappear even if I forget it
Reality is repainting the road I built with ideals
Memories are left behind as brilliance on that path
Why, and for what sake, did we say goodbye?
The sad light is casting my shadow long ahead
Sometimes I get a fever, I sleep when I have time
In a dream where I know it's a dream, I'll meet you and then I'll go again
Even in an endless darkness that is far from a clear sky
If I imagine the stars, I'm already in the galaxy
Even if I don't cry much anymore, even if I get new shoes
It's okay, that pain won't disappear even if I forget it
There was surely something I wanted to tell you
It was probably something commonplace, but even so
Saying goodbye is connected to meeting you
That transparent comet is transparent, so it won't disappear
O, X, triangle, which is it? Comparing myself to everyone
Living is the best, there's no time to check
Even if I don't cry much anymore, I'll just smile and bluff my way through
It's okay, that pain won't disappear even if I forget it
It's okay, you are at the beginning of this light
